sections.paragraph:
constr. עֲקֵב, plur. constr. עִקְבֵי (in some printed copies עִקְּבֵי with Dag. euphon.) m.

(1) the heel-(a) of men, Gen 3:15 Psa 56:7 Job 18:9 Jer 13:22 Son 1:8.-(b) of horses, the hoof, Gen 49:17 Jud. 5:22 .

(2) metaph. the extreme rear of an army, Jos 8:13 Gen 49:19.

(3) plur. עִקְּבֹות prints (of the heel or foot), Psa 77:20 89:52 (compare Son 1:8).

(4) verbal adj. of the root No. 3, a lier in wait, Psa 49:6.
